description: Deep archive for the Kinitos origin story and the later NeoEdge Networks era, covering documents, demos, artifacts, and recovered code.
person_context: Steven Woods co-founded Kinitos in 2002 after AOL and later co-founded NeoEdge Networks; this archive is the canonical deep history for that company line.

timeline_span.label: Kinitos founding through NeoEdge acquisition era

focus_value: Blue Noodle wind-down, investor trail, MostFun, Double Fusion asset-path, and archived site-capture research
